subcodes.first_line: This Leaf of Paradise have We sent unto thee, wherein lieth that which shall gladden thine eyes and the eyes of them that believe in divine unity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذه ورقه الفردوس قد ارسلناها الیک و فیها ما تقر به عینک و عیون الموحدین و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation
